steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage immediately explains that the Wi-Fi alternative “can give users a cheap way” to detect people through walls. This is the concrete benefit being described.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
B) inexpensive directly expresses the cost benefit of the Wi-Fi solution.

A, C, and D each misidentify the relevant feature—unmistakable and infrequent describe unrelated properties, while impractical contradicts the passage's claim that this alternative works.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
